default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and streamline sales and operational processes for fwd.digital, focusing on hiring, training, and deal management.](https://fathom.video/share/Y4AE2_CArVwajFef1xy9zrEA3VNxznEf?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritized areas: 1) Training 2) Hiring 3) Sales process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Y4AE2_CArVwajFef1xy9zrEA3VNxznEf?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Need to standardize and document processes, especially from first meeting to SLW follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/Y4AE2_CArVwajFef1xy9zrEA3VNxznEf?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)
  - [Bruno to take ownership of CRM (Airtable) cleanup and process implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Y4AE2_CArVwajFef1xy9zrEA3VNxznEf?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Investors showing strong interest; company growing rapidly but facing scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/Y4AE2_CArVwajFef1xy9zrEA3VNxznEf?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Topics

### Investor Interest and Company Growth

action_items.description: Take ownership of sales process in CRM. Clean up/standardize all deal info. Ensure all fields filled, add context/research for each deal/contact.
Review all active deals in CRM. Add/update 'next steps' for each. Prioritize follow-ups, esp. high-value opps (e.g. Claire - $20k/mo).
Set up regular (daily/weekly) CRM review sessions w/ Marcel. Prep updates on deal statuses, next steps, follow-ups needed.
Document current sales process. Identify areas for improvement. Discuss w/ Marcel for refinement.
Familiarize w/ email templates in CRM. Use/modify for follow-ups. Ensure consistent communication w/ prospects/clients.
